description: Created by Michael for supervisors to analyze course reserves circulation history.
instructions: Displays checkout counts using Lev's circulation history logics with user-defined filters to narrow down course reserves.

parameters.name: term_name
parameters.displayName: Term name (exact match, e.g. 2025 Spring Quarter) — takes priority over date range if provided

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter start date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter end date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: show_historical
parameters.displayName: Include historical (inactive) reserve records (1 to toggle ON)
